_note: Top-Down Sectoral universe (owner directive 2026-07-16): major NSE sectors -> parent index (Yahoo symbol for the yfinance fallback; Dhan id TBD when the scrip master / token is available) + ~10 prominent large/mid-cap constituents each ('.NS' Yahoo tickers). Feeds src/analysis/sector_trend.py (is_sector_bullish / get_relative_strength) and the fundamental+price vacuum. A stock may appear in >1 sector (e.g. COALINDIA in METAL+ENERGY); primary_sector picks its home for relative-strength. Constituents are real currently-listed names but membership drifts — validate before any live use.

BATTERY_EV._index_caveat: No dedicated 10yr EV/battery index with a clean Yahoo symbol exists; ^CNXAUTO used as the parent-trend PROXY (EV/battery are auto-adjacent). Relative-strength vs AUTO is approximate for pure-chemistry names (TATACHEM/GRAPHITE).
